title: Dark Choco Tandoori Salad
description: A tangy and crisp meal-prep Ukrainian dish featuring dark chocolate, tandoor-style spices, with a focus on being fodmap-friendly.

ingredients.name: Crispy vegetables (e.g. cauliflower rice, kale), finely chopped
Greek yogurt
ingredients.notes: Replace with plain almond or soy milk for a dairy-free option.

instructions: Mix the Greek yogurt with honey or maple syrup in a bowl until smooth.
Spread the yogurt mixture over the chopped crispy vegetables and evenly distribute on a baking sheet.
Drizzle some of the tandoori spice blend over the top.
Add dark chocolate chips evenly distributed over the veggies, spreading them out slightly.
Roast for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Check if the chocolate is melted and well-coated with spices.
Remove from oven, sprinkle fresh mint leaves on top, and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
Serve cold as a refreshing salad.
